arabic: وَصَلْتُ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ. انْتَظَرْتُ طَوِيلًا فِي صَفِّ التَّفْتِيشِ. بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ، بَحَثْتُ عَنْ بَوَّابَةِ الْمُغَادَرَةِ الْخَاصَّةِ بِرِحْلَتِي. كَانَتِ الطَّائِرَةُ كَبِيرَةً وَمُرِيحَةً جِدًّا. شَعَرْتُ بِالسَّعَادَةِ عِنْدَمَا أَقْلَعَتِ الطَّائِرَةُ نَحْوَ مَدِينَةِ دُبَيَّ.
translation: Stigao sam na aerodrom rano ujutro. Dugo sam čekao u redu za pregled. Nakon toga sam potražio izlaz za moj let. Avion je bio veoma velik i udoban. Bio sam sretan kada je avion poletio prema Dubaiju.
translationEn: I arrived at the airport early in the morning. I waited for a long time in the security line. After that, I looked for the departure gate for my flight. The plane was very large and comfortable. I felt happy when the plane took off towards the city of Dubai.
